query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: An abstract image dominated by olive-green and yellow tones with soft, indistinct shapes that appear to be organic forms or fabric-like structures receding into a darker central void. Lighter areas pool toward the bottom and right edges, suggesting some reflective or translucent surface quality. The central forms hint at curved, layered elements possibly resembling folded material or biological tissue viewed at close range.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image dominated by sickly olive-green and faded yellow tones with heavy intentional blur throughout, rendering soft, indistinct shapes that lack any fine detail or clear texture. The organic forms or fabric-like structures recede into a darker central void with mushy, smeared surfaces where surfaces dissolve into ambiguity. Lighter areas pool toward the bottom and right edges with low tonal separation, creating an oppressive, unhealthy atmosphere that suggests decay or contamination rather than clear representation.
